moving.label: Moving
moving.meaning: Some unusual activity, but not a major event by itself.

in_event.label: In Event
in_event.meaning: This coin is part of the selected market-wide detection.

strong_move.label: Strong Move
strong_move.meaning: Moved unusually strongly compared with recent baseline.

data_delay.label: Data Delay
data_delay.meaning: Latest market data may be delayed or incomplete.
